title: Our Villager Discounts
description: A server-only lightweight mod that shares villager discounts across the server.
body:
A server-only lightweight mod that shares villager discounts across the server. See the alternative [data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/our-villager-discounts-datapack) for a version that shouldn't need to update for every Minecraft release.

### Why?

* There is an [open issue from 1.14.2](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-153392) which prevents this from being a simple datapack on villager NBT data.
* Players can share a single trading hall to reduce the strain on a server.
* Players can share in the fruits of painful villager curing processes.

### Special instructions for Fabric

Fabric relies on both the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) mods.
